deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, profit $42-62K. Homestead Vested source.
deals.next: Build first CMA analysis sheet, lock template for future deals

logs.m: Deal received from Homestead Vested. Used for property analysis tool development.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Development opportunity with Isaac Linares. Mobile home project for displaced veterans. Title defect resolved. Sisters no longer interested. Signs picked up.

logs.m: Listing terminated. Signs retrieved. No path forward with Isaac or traditional sale.
Isaac discussed ~$150K offer for mobile home development. Sisters enthusiastic but path stalled.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: 208 DOM, underwater by $93-143K. VA loan at $489.5K payoff. Sellers moving back in to repair and relist later. Short sale discussed but not pursued.

logs.m: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Sellers moving back in to make updates.
Call completed. Chandler laid off. Short sale path discussed. Sellers leaning short sale. Honest conversation approach appreciated.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA, Laura Heights PUD. Referral from Isaac Linares. Sellers relocating to NC second week June. Pre-inspection report completed. Multiple showings. Second-look buyers are hottest lead.
deals.next: Confirm May 30 showing time. Monitor for offer from second-look buyers.

logs.m: Second-look buyers came back. This is their favorite property. Pre-inspection report offered. Rescheduled to May 30.
MLS live. Sign and lockbox dropped. Canvassed neighborhood. First showing 9:15am today.
Listing agreement signed. Photos from ATG received. 43 photos plus floorplans.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: 3BR/2BA, 1809 sqft, 4.05 acres, Frio County. Prior VA loan clients. Divorce situation. Payoff ~$257K. CMA recommends $295K. Net to sellers at this price: ~$14.7K.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender before listing. Confirm acreage and renovation status. Get listing agreement signed.

logs.m: Met at property ~10am. Payoff confirmed $255,578. CMA pulled. Built net sheet. Ready to move forward.
Prior clients going through divorce. Need to finish renovation and sell.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned foreclosure. Contractor: HouzzPro/Matt Toney. Work started May 9. Floor demo done, drywall in progress. Utilities pending with Medina Electric and EMCSUD. Police report stalled.
deals.next: Call utilities to confirm new meter/service status. Replace camera batteries. Submit listing agreement to Jerry/Ray. Establish listing timeline once work done.

logs.m: Drywall crew actively patching. Sent photos to Kelly. Work progressing on schedule.
Floor demo complete. Drywall cut. New drywall on site. Utilities confirmed.
Work officially started. Dumpsters running since Saturday.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20-acre hunting property. A-735/A-756. Under contract with Espinoza buyers at $113K. Waiting on EMD and signed TXR 1903 amendment. Chicago Title (Alyssa Castillo) handling escrow.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received and signed amendment from Javier (buyer agent). Verify Mrs. Espinoza email domain.

logs.m: Under contract with Espinoza buyers at $113K. TXR 1903 amendment sent to Javier. EMD not yet received.
Price reduced to $117,500. Steve completed clearing work. Photos sent.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Cash transaction $152K. Military buyer (Exquisite SA). Lien blocker resolved Apr 21. Funded and closed Apr 27.
deals.next: Deliver gift basket to Joyce. Thank you note to Chelsey Bongiovi.

logs.m: Closed and funded. All parties satisfied.
Lien release signed by Fernando Castillo. Delivered to Chicago Title same day.

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss
deals.notes: Grace Gardens Lennar home. Rental listing arrangement. Jimbo backed out May 28. Chris sent $500 for time invested. Closed on good terms.

logs.m: Release sent. Relationship ended professionally on good terms.
Jimbo backed out of rental arrangement. $500 sent to cover investment.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Rental being sold by landlord. Pivoting to new construction, no HOA required. Out of Corpus Christi deal. Evaluating 301 W Saxet wholesale (Isaac) at $85K with FHA 203k financing. Zach Schaphorst pre-approval ~$122K. Decision pending.
leads.next: Follow up after Mike speaks with Isaac about Corpus property. If Saxet falls through, restart new construction search.

logs.m: Out of 301 W Saxet Corpus deal. Too much for them. Still actively searching.
Evaluating 301 W Saxet wholesale. Connected with Isaac. Zach S evaluating FHA 203k.

leads.title: Bryce & Wife
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751 Priority Bank property. Wife is active military, VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting. Looking to purchase in San Antonio area.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info next visit to 181 CR. Confirm wife VA eligibility. Send VA Buyers Guide.

logs.m: Met Bryce (dumpster contractor) on-site. Wife is active military, VA eligible. Fresh to the area.

leads.title: Milagros Stringer
leads.detail: Brandon Morans mother. New construction buyer, Grace Gardens or similar Lennar community. $50K down, target ~$1K/month P+I. Builder rate buydowns leverage key angle. Buyer rep signed May 7. Not locked to any builder.
leads.next: MI Homes option from Frank still in play. Follow up on her timeline and interest level.

logs.m: Need to follow up with Milagros. Ask Brandon about her timeline and interest level.
Buyer rep sent. MI Homes option from Frank keeps payment under $1200/mo.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Downline agent from Schertz/Cibolo area. Has a buyer interested in fixer property. Unique situation. Details pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome. Get full details on buyer, property needs, price range, and unique situation.

logs.m: Met with Jerome. Details on buyer and property situation pending.

leads.title: Christina Shine
leads.detail: Met at garden event May 9. Has property at 13810 Tangle Tree St. Planning to sell soon but currently working with another realtor. ~90% complete, having trouble finishing. Open to selling as-is. Pre-market opportunity.
leads.next: Follow up on how finishing work is going. Offer to promote listing to Chris network if relationship with current agent ends.

logs.m: Met at garden event. Property 90% complete, having trouble finishing. Currently listed with another agent.

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor Son
leads.detail: Son inherited house behind Miss Pat. Previous owner (deceased) was avid gardener. Son is new owner, not contacted yet. Probate/inherited property opportunity. Sensitive timing.
leads.next: Get more info from Miss Pat (son name, contact). Reach out to son as neighbor and gardener first, realtor second.

logs.m: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor behind her passed away. Son now owns house.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection through Little Red House garden group. Grief, healing, and plants story. Potential content collaboration with permission. Real estate potential long-term.
leads.next: Follow up with Sallie Mae. Ask permission for story collaboration. Keep nurturing relationship.

logs.m: Community connection identified. Healing through gardens story potential.

leads.title: Kurt Lehr
leads.detail: Neighbor around corner from 9815 Conbes. Watching nearby listing under contract at $275K. Wants intel on offers and deal details. Possible seller or buyer lead.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Karts area. Follow up on 9815 Conbes deal details. Determine if Kurt is seller, buyer, or just curious.

logs.m: CMA pull priority. Pull listing timeline for 9815 Conbes.
Spoke with Kurt about nearby listing at 9815 Conbes.

priorities.notes: Multiple showings completed. Second-look buyers came back - this is their favorite property. Pre-inspection report offered. Jose and Katy relocating to NC second week of June - high urgency.

followUps.text: Confirm May 30 showing time with all parties
Monitor for offer submission from second-look buyers
Track investor cash offer at $176.3K - kept conversation open

priorities.notes: Priority Bank REO. HouzzPro renovation underway since May 9. Drywall in progress. Electrical and plumbing rough-in done. Medina Electric and EMCSUD service setup pending. Listing agreement still needs to go to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham.

Call EMCSUD 830-709-3879 - confirm water service setup
Submit listing agreement to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham

priorities.sub: Colton and Abigail Brown - Divorce situation - Get payoff letter
priorities.notes: Met Colton and Abigail May 15. CMA done. Net sheet built. Payoff confirmed at ~$257K (as of Feb 2026). Market value $295-315K range. Recommended list at $295K nets sellers ~$14.7K after costs.

followUps.text: Get updated payoff letter from lender before listing agreement
Confirm exact acreage - impacts pricing significantly
Confirm renovation status and what work is left
Get listing agreement signed and scheduled for photos

priorities.notes: Under contract with Espinoza buyers at $113K. TXR 1903 amendment sent to Javier (buyer agent) to update financing amount. Earnest money not yet received. Chicago Title (Alyssa Castillo) opened escrow. Backup offer ready if Espinoza deal falls through.

followUps.text: Confirm EMD received from Espinoza buyers
Confirm signed TXR 1903 amendment back from Javier
Verify Mrs. Espinoza email - tmail.com may be typo for gmail

priorities.notes: Brandon Morans mother. Buyer rep signed May 7. $50K down, target ~$1K P+I monthly. Builder rate buydowns significantly shift purchase power. MI Homes option from Frank keeps payments under $1200/mo. Not locked to any builder yet.
